questions.text: Anita writes Solidity code daily, deploys contracts on testnet using Hardhat, and spends her afternoons gas-optimising a staking pool. Which role describes her?
questions.explanation: Writing and deploying smart contracts in Solidity is the core responsibility of a Smart Contract Engineer. A frontend developer builds the UI, a community manager moderates chat, and DevRel writes tutorials - they may code but not as their primary daily output.
questions.modelAnswer:
✅ Correct Answer: B - Explanation

Writing and deploying smart contracts in Solidity is the core responsibility of a Smart Contract Engineer. A frontend developer builds the UI, a community manager moderates chat, and DevRel writes tutorials - they may code but not as their primary daily output.

questions.text: Karan spends his day writing SQL queries on Dune Analytics, building dashboards that track protocol TVL and user retention. He never writes smart contracts. His role is best described as:
questions.explanation: An On-Chain Data Analyst uses tools like Dune to query blockchain data with SQL. A Subgraph Developer writes indexer code (AssemblyScript/GraphQL), not primarily SQL dashboards. An auditor reviews contract code; a researcher designs algorithms.
questions.modelAnswer:
✅ Correct Answer: C - Explanation

An On-Chain Data Analyst uses tools like Dune to query blockchain data with SQL. A Subgraph Developer writes indexer code (AssemblyScript/GraphQL), not primarily SQL dashboards. An auditor reviews contract code; a researcher designs algorithms.

questions.text: Meera is an excellent public speaker with basic Solidity knowledge. She writes beginner tutorials, records video walkthroughs, and answers developer questions on Discord. Which role fits her?
questions.explanation: DevRel bridges the protocol and its developer community through education and advocacy. Community Managers focus on user engagement and moderation, while DevRel specifically targets developers with technical content.
questions.modelAnswer:
✅ Correct Answer: C - Explanation

DevRel bridges the protocol and its developer community through education and advocacy. Community Managers focus on user engagement and moderation, while DevRel specifically targets developers with technical content.

questions.text: A job description requires “experience with Slither, Echidna, and manual code review of Solidity contracts.” The role is most likely:
questions.explanation: Slither and Echidna are smart contract security tools used exclusively by auditors and security engineers. Frontend and data roles do not use these tools.
questions.modelAnswer:
✅ Correct Answer: C - Explanation

Slither and Echidna are smart contract security tools used exclusively by auditors and security engineers. Frontend and data roles do not use these tools.

questions.text: Rahul manages a protocol's Discord with 50,000 members, organises weekly AMAs, runs meme contests, and moderates governance discussions. He does not code. His role is:
questions.explanation: Community Manager focuses on engagement, events, and moderation - without a primary coding responsibility. DevRel also does community but with a technical developer-facing focus, often writing code tutorials.
questions.modelAnswer:
✅ Correct Answer: B - Explanation

Community Manager focuses on engagement, events, and moderation - without a primary coding responsibility. DevRel also does community but with a technical developer-facing focus, often writing code tutorials.
